title: allium globosum var. stevenii
intro: Allium globosum var. stevenii, also known as Steven's wild garlic or wild chive, is a perennial plant belonging to the Allium genus, which includes species like garlic and onions. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Allium globosum var. stevenii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
